title: Meeting Summary
scenario: Summarize a meeting discussion about a new project. The output should be a brief summary of 2-3 sentences that includes the project name, key decisions made, and action items assigned to team members.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the summary includes the key decisions made during the meeting.
Check if the summary includes the action items assigned to team members.
Verify if the project name is correctly mentioned.
